news.title: Boost your career with new AI summer short course
news.summary_en: The University of Minnesota is offering a new four-week summer short course to help professionals boost their careers and their productivity with new AI skills.

news.title: University of Minnesota to host start of cross-country solar car competition
news.summary_en: For the first time in its 33-year history, the University of Minnesota Twin Cities Solar Vehicle Project Team will host the official starting line for the 2026 Electrek American Solar Challenge, one of the nation’s premier solar competitions.

news.title: Computer science student wins BizPitch Competition
news.summary_en: Kanav Gupta, an international student from India in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering, won the 2026 University of Minnesota BizPitch Competition.
